allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\(''''fs''''\).readFileSync\(''''/dev/stdin'''',''''utf8''''\)\); console.log\(''''hooks'''' in d ? ''''Has hooks section'''' : ''''No hooks in settings.json''''\); if\(d.hooks\) console.log\(JSON.stringify\(d.hooks,null,2\).substring\(0,500\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const s=JSON.parse\(require\(''''fs''''\).readFileSync\(''''$HOME/.claude/settings.json'''',''''utf8''''\)\); const h=s.hooks; console.log\(''''PreToolUse:'''', h.PreToolUse.length, ''''hooks''''\); console.log\(''''PostToolUse:'''', h.PostToolUse.length, ''''hooks''''\); console.log\(''''SessionStart:'''', h.SessionStart.length, ''''hooks''''\); h.PreToolUse.forEach\(\(x,i\)=>console.log\(''''  Pre'''',i,x.matcher,''''-'''',\(x.description||''''GSD''''\).substring\(0,50\)\)\)")
